name: arr-assistant-mcp
description: MCP server for searching and adding movies and TV shows in Radarr and Sonarr
long_description: A streamlined MCP server that provides tools for searching movies and TV shows, adding them to Radarr and Sonarr, and checking server connectivity with automatic root folder detection.

tools.name: test_config
tools.description: Test configuration and connectivity to Radarr and Sonarr

tools.name: search_movies
tools.description: Search for movies by title using Radarr's built-in lookup

tools.name: add_movie_by_id
tools.description: Add a specific movie to Radarr using its TMDb ID with an optional root folder

tools.name: search_and_add_show
tools.description: Search for TV shows and optionally add the best match to Sonarr

tools.name: add_show_by_tvdb_id
tools.description: Add a specific TV show to Sonarr using its TVDB ID with an optional root folder

tools.name: get_server_status
tools.description: Check the status and connectivity of Radarr and Sonarr servers

radarr_url.title: Radarr URL
radarr_url.description: URL to your Radarr instance (for example, http://192.168.1.11:7878)

radarr_api_key.title: Radarr API Key
radarr_api_key.description: API key for your Radarr instance (Settings > General)

sonarr_url.title: Sonarr URL
sonarr_url.description: URL to your Sonarr instance (for example, http://192.168.1.11:8989)

sonarr_api_key.title: Sonarr API Key
sonarr_api_key.description: API key for your Sonarr instance (Settings > General)

quality_profile_id.title: Quality Profile ID
quality_profile_id.description: Default quality profile ID to use for new media

radarr_root_folder.title: Radarr Root Folder
radarr_root_folder.description: Default movie root folder. If omitted, the server auto-detects one.

sonarr_root_folder.title: Sonarr Root Folder
sonarr_root_folder.description: Default TV root folder. If omitted, the server auto-detects one.
